documentation_accuracy_summary: docs/website-launch-guide.md now matches the shipped homepage positioning by describing the branded homepage as the Milestone 2 auth-enabled foundation.
The refreshed docs stay within current scope and do not promise later-milestone features beyond the existing public/authenticated shell baseline.
test_sufficiency_summary: Sufficient for the scoped copy refresh: apps/web/app/public-shell.spec.ts now asserts the Milestone 2 wording in both app/page.tsx and app/layout.tsx and explicitly rejects Milestone 1 wording.
Independent verifier reruns of the targeted Vitest file, web lint, and web typecheck all passed in this worktree.
